title: phyllanthus polygonoides
intro: Phyllanthus polygonoides, also known as Amla or Nelli, is a small, evergreen shrub native to tropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Phyllanthus polygonoides include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and improving digestion, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to topical creams and ointments.
